description: Static RFI mask v3 (CASM at OVRO). Expanded over v1: widens the GMRS / amateur / TV-ch14 bands and adds two extra bands ('manual', 'manual2') after observing residual contamination at the v1 band edges. The 'manual2' range was further widened to 441.5-448 MHz to swallow two near-single-channel unflagged islands (441.5-442 and 447-448) that v1 left between adjacent RFI bands — too narrow to constrain a slope, sandwiched by contaminated channels. Bump the version number when bands change; keep older versions on disk for reproducibility.
